body: Hey Amara, hope you're doing well! I wanted to reach out because we've been tracking a few companies in the climate infrastructure space that I think could be a strong fit for [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital)'s thesis, and I'd love to compare notes given how active you've been at the seed and Series A stage. We're seeing a real surge in deals at the intersection of grid modernization and AI-driven energy management, and I suspect we may be looking at some of the same names. Would you be open to a quick call sometime this week or next to sync up? Always better to know early if we're likely to be sitting across the table from each other — or better yet, co-investing. Let me know what works on your end.
